entities.name: ZOMBI PEA
entities.description: A nutritious and underutilized leguminous vegetable (Vigna vexillata) used as a potential gene source for breeding abiotic stress resistant varieties

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental change that makes providing a healthy and nutritious diet a major challenge

entities.name: NUTRITIOUS DIET
entities.description: A healthy diet required to combat hunger and malnutrition

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant variety to withstand non-biological environmental stresses

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The tropical, subtropical, and coastal regions where the zombi pea study was conducted

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL STATUS
entities.description: The level of nutrients found in the tubers, pods, and pericarp of the zombi pea

entities.name: PLANT SPACING
entities.description: The distance between plants used as a treatment to evaluate its effect on nutrient accumulation

entities.name: DEBLOSSOMING
entities.description: The process of removing blossoms from the plant to study its influence on nutritional status

entities.name: SPLIT PLOT DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to conduct the study with three replications and eight treatments

entities.name: NUTRIENT PROFILING
entities.description: The analytical method used to determine the accumulation of nutrients in tubers and pericarp

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A nutrient whose accumulation in zombi pea is higher with blossom retention

entities.name: MAGNESIUM
entities.description: A nutrient whose accumulation in zombi pea is higher with blossom retention

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A nutrient whose accumulation in zombi pea is higher with blossom retention

entities.name: MANGANESE
entities.description: A nutrient whose accumulation in zombi pea is higher with blossom retention

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A nutrient whose accumulation in zombi pea is higher with blossom retention

entities.name: BLOSSOM RETENTION
entities.description: The practice of keeping blossoms on the plant, leading to higher nutrient accumulation

entities.name: PROTEIN ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The buildup of protein in zombi pea tubers, which increases with wider plant spacing

entities.name: ORPHAN CROP
entities.description: A crop that is underutilized or neglected, such as the zombi pea
